task_completion.description: Access the source tax documents for Mei-Lin Chen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer or document viewer showing files opened from the directory C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen\.

task_completion.description: Start a 2024 tax return for Mei-Lin Chen in the tax software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tax software (e.g., StudioTax) open with a new 2024 return, displaying the taxpayer name 'Mei-Lin Chen' in the personal information section.

task_completion.description: Enter information from the documents into the tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent actively filling out income fields (such as self-employment, royalties, or grants) within the tax software interface.

task_completion.description: Initiate the process to save the completed tax return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box open in the tax software, preparing to save the return.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return with the correct filename in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window or save confirmation showing the file 'mei_lin_chen.24t' successfully saved inside the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\ directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical tax software application to complete the return.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of a genuine tax software GUI (like StudioTax) being interacted with, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually entered the data into the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing step-by-step navigation and data entry in the tax forms, rather than just opening a pre-filled file.

integrity.description: Verify the output file was not created using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal commands like 'touch mei_lin_chen.24t' or 'echo > mei_lin_chen.24t' used to bypass actual software interaction.
